title: KHAWZAWLAH PM-KISAN UTSAV DIWAS HMAN A NI
content:
1100/2026-2027

Dated  Khawzawl, the 20th June 2026 : Vawiin khan KVK leh DAO Khawzawl tangkawpin KVK Training hall-ah PM KISAN UTSAV DIWAS hun hman a ni a. He hun hi Dr. Malsawmkimi Senior Scientist & Head KVK Khawzawl chuan kaihruaiin, Pi Lalhmangaihzuali, DAO staff Khawzawl chuan PM Kisan chungchang kalkhawmte hnenah sawizauna hun a hmang a ni.Pi R. Vanlalduati, SMS (Soil Science) chuan kalkhawmte hnenah leilung him zawk leh hrisel zawk kan neih nan Leitha inbuk tawka hman a pawimawh zia sawiin, Pu Rambuatsaiha SMS (Agronomy) chuan tunlaia sawrkar laipuiin kuthnathawktute hnena Awareness campaign a neih mek ram leilung, buh leh bal kan chinna hmun te uluk leh him zawka kan enkawl theih dan tur chungchang kalkhawmte hnenah a sawi bawk a ni.Vawiina kalkhawmte hi PM Kisan hnuaia inziak lut te an ni a. PM Kisan Samman Nidhi 23rd Instalment, Prime Minister Pu Narendra Modi-in 99.44 crore farmer-te hnena Rs. 1,880 crore a sem chu Live Telecast hmangin an thlir ho bawk.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWLAH SVANIDHI MAHOTSAV PROGRAMME LEH FOSTAC BASIC TRAINING NEIH A NI
content:
1099/2026-2027

Dated  Khawzawl, the 20th June 2026 : Vawiin khan Urban Development & Poverty Alleviation (UD&PA) Department, Khawzawl leh Food & Drugs Administration, Directorate of Health Services tangkawp buatsaih SVANidhi Mahotsav Programme chu Zuchhip YMA Hall-ah hman a ni a, hetah hian FSSAI empanelled trainer Professor Dr Deborshi De hoin FOSTAC (Food Safety Training and Certificate) Basic training for General Manufacturing and basic  catering leh Hygiene and food safety training  neih a ni.Pi Mimi Lalrinngheti CMM, DAY-NULM chuan SVANidhi Mahotsav sawifiahna hun hmangin Pi Lalrinkimi Pachuau, Designated Officer, Food & Drugs Administration, Mizoram chuan dan hnuaiah thianghlim taka eisiam a pawimawh thu leh kan eisiam thianghlim loh avanga mipuiin an tawrh theih dan te, a siamtu hrem theih a nih dan te sawifiahna hun a hmang bawk.Professor Dr Deborshi De chuan ei leh in siamtu/zuartute chu he training hi an neih ngei ngei a ngaih thu te, eisiamna atana a siamtu te invawn fai a pawimawh thu te, India ramah kan eiin siamna hmanrua leh a siamtute invawn felfai loh avanga mipuiin natna kan kai theih dan hrang hrang te, nitin eitur kan zawrh leh mahni inlam a kan siam dan diklo te tih dik dan sawifiahna te a nei a. Eitur kan siamna hmanrua kan hman nawn fo avanga natna kan neih theih dan te, chung chuan zawi zawiin kan taksa a tihchhiat theih dan practical-in zirtirna a pe bawk a ni.He training-ah hian Khawzawl khawchhung Street Vendors leh Self Help Group member atangin mi 80 an tel a. He training a tel zawng zawngte hi Government of India in FOSTAC Certificate a pe dawn a ni. Food Safety and Standard Authority of India hnuaiah registration tih nghal niin, registration ti thar mi 20 hnenah FSSAI license pek an ni bawk. Chawhnu session-ah Street Vendors awareness campaign neih a ni a, registration la ti ve lote in register tur a hriattir na hun hman nghal a ni.

Attachment

title: ADDL. DC HOVIN KOLASIB DISTRICT CHHUNGA NATIONAL HIGHWAY (NH-306 & 06) THAWMTHAT HNA ENDIK A NI
content:
1098/2026-2027

Kolasib, 20th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Pi B Malsawmtluangi,Kolasib Additional Deputy Commissioner (Addl. DC) hovin Kolasib District chhunga National Highway (NH 306 & 06) thawmthat leh siamthat hna (STMC works) thawh mek chu a hmuna fankual leh endikna (Joint Inspection) neih a ni a. He endikna hi Diakkawn atanga tanin Vairengte lam leh Khamrang lam kawngte fan kual a ni.

Tun dinhmunah Kawngpui hi a tlangpui thuin lirthei tlan nuam tawk tura siam a ni tawh hlawm a. Amaherawhchu, hmun engemaw zatah  tlan harsa khawpa chhe zual lai a la awm bawk. Hemi chungchangah hian kawng siamtu NHIDCL hotute chuan report pein, kawng chhe zual bikte hi tui put vang leh a hmun leilungin a zawh loh (soil condition) vang hrim hrima chhe hma bik a nih thu an sawi a. Heng hmun chhe zual tak takte hi concrete pavement tura rawtna (proposal) pawh thehluh a nih tawh thu an tarlang .

Addl. DC chuan kawng siamtute chu theihtawp chhuaha hma la zel turin a chah a. Khualzin leh lirthei tlante himna leh awlsam nan kawng chhe zualpui laite chu endika chhinchhiah (identify) zung zung a, a rang thei ang bera thawmthat hna thawk thuai thin turin a ngen a ni. Mipui mimir ten harsatna lian tham an tawh loh nan hmalak zung zung a pawimawh thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiina NH 306 & 06 Joint Inspection neihah hian Addl. DC hi Executive Engineer, PWD, NHD-III, Kolasib,NHIDCL-PMU, Kolasib aiawhte leh  STMC Contractors ten an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: FCI kudam hrang hrangah Buhfai leh Wheat- stock 24,858 MT a awm mek
content:
1097/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 20th June 2026 :Mizoram chhunga FCI kudam hrang hrangah June 20, 2026- a Buhfai leh Wheat- stock awm zat chu 24,858 MT; Buhfai – 23,862 MT leh Wheat – 996 MT a ni.

Furpui vanglaia mipuiin ei tur an tlakchhawm loh nan leh stock a awm reng theih nan, Mizoram lamah rail hmangin Buhfai leh wheat rawn phurh mek a ni a. Hei hi Bairabi railhead (FSD Bualpui, Kolasib leh Bairabi) leh Sairang railhead (FSD Sairang, Aizawl, Lunglei leh Lawngtlai) kaltlangin a lo thleng thin.

Tun hnaiah hian rail hmangin June leh July 2026 chhunga buhfai lo kal tur leh kal mek zat hi 20,032 MT a ni a. Tun dinhmuna stock awm zat hi a thahnem tawk hle a, 24,858 MT stock hian National Food Security Act (NFSA) leh welfare scheme dangte Mizoram pum mamawh thla 4 vel chhung daih thei tura ngaih a ni. Thla tin atana NFSA leh welfare scheme mamawh zat chu: Rice – 6,209 MT Wheat – 123 MT a ni a. Stock awm mek leh ruahman sa lo kal turte hi safety buffer norm aiin an thahnem zawk a ni.

FCI chuan Mizoram Sawrkar tan mamawh aia tam mah pe thei turin Open Market Sale Scheme – Domestic (OMSS-D) hnuaiah e-auction tel lovin Bufai a pe a, hei bakah hian, June thla atan Buhfai 3,000 MT chu sem tura ruahman ni tawhin chu mi tihlawhtling tur chuan rail rake dang 2,600 MT pawh chah belh tum a ni.

FCI chuan ei leh bar lo luh dan hi nitin a thlithlai reng a, mipuiten eitur tha an ei theih nan a chhekkhawlna storage facility-te pawh a tha thei ang berin a enkawl mek a ni.

title: UD&PA Minister Pu K. Sapdanga'n Lungleiah thu thar theh darhtute a kawm
content:
1096/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 20:Vawiin khan Mizoram sawrkara Urban Development & Poverty Alleviation (UD&PA) Minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Lunglei Circuit House Conference Hall-ah Lungleia thu thar theh darhtu, Mizoram Journalists' Association (MJA), Lunglei District member-te kawmin, thingpui a inpui.

Minister hi Adviser to Chief Minister (Political) Pu Lalmuanpuia Punte, MLA bakah, UD&PA Commissioner & Secretary Pu K. Lalthawmmawia leh Director Pu Jacob Lalawmpuia te'n an ṭawiawm a. MJA Lunglei District hi an President Pu H. Lalthansanga'n hovin, Lunglei khawpui hmasawnna tur hma lakna leh hmachhawp hrang hrang an sawi ho.

UD&PA Minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan tun ṭuma Lunglei an tlawh chu tum bik nei leh thu lawmawm kenga kal an nih thu sawiin, Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC)-in Lunglei mipuite tana hna a thawhna kawngah hun rei tak hna thawk hlei thei lova a awm hnuah UD&PA Secretariat leh Directorate te nen an harsatna chin fel dan tur uluk taka ngaihtuahin, a ṭul anga an mamawh ngaihtuahsak turin Lungleiah chuan an thawk phei tih a sawi a. Lunglei hmasawnna tura hma lak dan turah LMC hotute leh Lungleia MLA-te nen rilru inhmu taka thil an rel ho thu leh lawmawm an tih thu a sawi.

Minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Lunglei khawpui tana UD&PA-in a ruahman hmasawnna project lian zual tar langin, State Priority Project (SPP) hnuaiah cheng nuai 1,750 hu project lian 5 kalpui mek a awm thu a sawi a. Cheng nuai 400 senga Sazaikawna LMC Complex dinna turah ram lei tura biak fel tawh a man pe hlei thei lova kum hnih a awm hnuah tunah ram leina tur sum funa an thawh phei thu leh vawiinah inhlan a nih tur thu sawiin, ram man an pe tlak thei ta chu lawmawm an tih thu a sawi a. LMC Complex sa tur hian contractor thlan fel a nih tawh thu leh hna an ṭan nghal theih dawn thu a sawi.

Minister chuan SPP hnuaiah hian cheng nuai 350 senga lirthei lian leh te din khawmna tur Transport Hub sakna turin Theiriatah mimal ram lei a nih thu leh a man pek tlakna tur tunah an rawn fun phei thu sawiin, contractor thlan fel tawh a nih thu leh a rem veleh an bun ṭan theih dawn thu a sawi a. Cheng nuai 200 senga Ramthar AOC Market Shed sakna tur pawh buaipui mek a nih thu sawiin, cheng nuai 300 senga C. Ṭhuamluaia Mual bula lirthei dahna Multi-Level Car Parking sak hna chu contractor-te'n an thawh mawp mawp tawh thu leh a hmun an laih zawh lek lek tawh thu a sawi a. Saikuti Hall chei ṭhatna turin cheng nuai 500 dah a nih thu leh dawhsan (stage), ṭhutna, lighting & sound, a chung leh thil hrang hrang thlak ngai thlak leh siam ṭhat tur a nih thu sawiin, a rang thei ang bera hna ṭan tum a nih tur thu a sawi.

Minister chuan Urban Infrastructure Development Fund (UIDF 2025–2026) hnuaiah Lunglei khawpui tan cheng nuai 525 dah a nih thu sawiin, Lunglei Park chei ṭhat nan cheng nuai 200 dah a nih thu leh khaw ṭhat veleh contractor-te'n hna an ṭan nghal tur thu a sawi a. Khawlaia vantlang inthiarna in (pay and use toilet) set 1 cheng nuai 25 zelin hmun 4-ah cheng nuai 100 senga siam tura ruahman a nih thu leh bul ṭan theih thuai beisei a nih thu sawiin, a enkawl nan inthiar man erawh a awm a ngai dawn tih a sawi a. Khawpui chhunga kea kalte veivahna footpath chei ṭhat nan cheng nuai 225 dah a nih thu leh khuain a zir chuan thawh ṭan theih thuai beisei a nih thu a sawi.

Minister chuan SASCI Part-XB hnuaiah Lunglei khawpui chhung hmasawnna hna hrang hrang 80 thawhna tur cheng nuai 200 dah a nih thu sawiin, Municipal te enkawl chhunzawm tur a nih thu a sawi a. Councillor-te'n an ward ṭheuhva thawh dan tur an siam fel tawh thu leh hna ṭan theih thuai beisei a nih thu a sawi.

Minister chuan SASCI Part-V aṭangin damdawi in bawlhhlawh, mipui tana hmuh hrehawm leh him lote tihralna tur leh damdawi in chhung hmanrua tihral leh sawngbawlna turin Theriatah Common Bio-Medical Waste Treatment Facility din tum a nih thu sawiin, ram neih fel a nih tawh thu leh a sak nan hian cheng nuai 1,400 ruahman a nih thu a sawi a. Chhim District pali dawl zo tura ruahmanna siam a nih thu leh tender tura lehkha pawimawh buatsaih mek a nih thu a sawi.

Minister chuan SASCI Part-XIII hnuaiah kawr lian hlauhawm siam thei leh a muala tawlh ṭhin tihdamna leh venna tur storm drain siam nan cheng vaibelchhe 10 ruahman a nih thu leh Lungleiah cheng nuai 250 dah a nih thu a sawi a. UD&PA aṭanga Lunglei khawpui tihhmasawnna leh chei mawina atana hmin sa hna thawh mai tur tun ṭuma an rawn feh chhuahpui chu a zavaiin cheng nuai 5,387 hu a nih thu a sawi.

UD&PA Minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Lunglei khawpui tana UD&PA project zawng zawng chu rulh leh ngai chi a awm vak lo tih sawiin, project tam zawk chu sum hnar awm tur a nih zawk thu a sawi a. Lunglei khawpui enkawlna atana sum tuakna tur project deuh vek a nih avangin a phurawmin a lawmawm tak zet tiin, UD&PA leh LMC hotute an lawm ang bawkin Lunglei mipuite pawh an hlim ve hle a beisei thu a sawi.

He hunah hian MJA member-te'n sawrkar hma lakna hrang hrang hriat duh an neihte chu Minister hi zawtin, rawtna leh mamawh an neihte Minister hnenah hian an thlen bawk a. Minister chuan an zawhnate chhangin, an rawtna leh mamawhte chu chhinchhiah a, a ṭul anga an en zui tur thu a sawi.

Attachment
